title: Surgeon Vacancy at Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies:
Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies!
